title: lathyrus ensifolius
intro: Lathyrus ensifolius, also known as the sword-leaved pea or needle pea, is a perennial flowering plant in the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus ensifolius include its potential to help lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds, leaves, and flowers are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
